creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jin-Sih,

thank you for submitting this update. However, it seems there is a problem
with the plist as shown at the end of the following tinderbox log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/elk-3.99.8.log

Could you have a look at this please?

Thanks,
culot@
